commit_scope: Align existing contributor and agent docs so humans and agents can contribute to GitHub, work on the API, and use Coherence-style guidance in other local or public repos.

commands: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.summary: Prompt guide passed before edits. git diff --check passed. make wellness passed with existing symbol-resolution, locale-parity, and CI-pattern drift signals named by the checker. Commit evidence validation passed. The first rebase attempt correctly failed on unstaged task edits; the branch was stashed, rebased cleanly onto origin/main, and restored before continuing. Local PR guard and follow-through checks passed.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub check monitoring.

deploy_validation.details: Documentation-only change; public verification applies after merge if the published docs surface changes.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation, PR CI, and merge are not complete yet.
